text:
Return to Shiganshina arc is the ninth story arc of the Attack on Titan anime.

Introduction

There is peace again within the Walls, and the Scout Regiment prepares for a new scouting mission to Shiganshina. Thanks to Hange Zoë's new weapon, the hopes to retake the lost territory once and for all are stronger than ever. But at their old home, known and powerful enemies are awaiting and a fierce battle is coming.

Episodes
